loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing this-month cumulative energy from PRIMARY incomers (Tx-5, Tx-6); Solar incomers have no data.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing energy consumption trend for PRIMARY incomers (Feeder → Tx-5, Feeder → Tx-6); Solar Incomers are dark (no data). Rated/Contracted lines are omitted as nameplate ratings are unknown for this asset.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing live power (kVA) and active/reactive breakdown from PRIMARY incomers (Tx-5, Tx-6); capacity and peak markers are ungrounded due to missing nameplate rating and windowed-peak columns.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing Worst Peak and UPS/BPDB demand series from member meters; Load Factor and Critical Demand threshold are omitted as no recovery fn or config constant is available for this asset.
